figures.caption: Fig. 6. The achievable rate region’s boundary for the communication rate R, common randomness rate R0, and distortion D with strong secrecy and realism defined in Definition 4. For distortions > 0.5, the achievable region extends along the distortion (vertical) axis beyond D = 0.5 for all R ≥ 0 and R0 ≥ 0.
